testcase.name: ingestBatch_blankMessage_returns400
testcase.system-out:
19:53:25.285 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.logpipeline.controller.LogIngestionControllerTest]: LogIngestionControllerTest does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 19:53:25.968 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.logpipeline.LogIngestionServiceApplication for test class com.logpipeline.controller.LogIngestionControllerTest

testcase.name: ingestSingle_validEvent_returns202
testcase.system-out: 2026-03-31T19:53:38.737+05:30 INFO 22492 --- [log-ingestion-service] [ main] c.l.controller.LogIngestionController : Received batch of 1 log events 2026-03-31T19:53:38.816+05:30 INFO 22492 --- [log-ingestion-service] [ main] c.l.controller.LogIngestionController : Published batch of 1 log events to Kafka

testcase.name: ingestBatch_multipleViolationsInOneEvent_allErrorsReported
testcase.system-out: 2026-03-31T19:53:39.117+05:30 WARN 22492 --- [log-ingestion-service] [ main] c.l.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler : Validation failed: [events[0].message: message must not be blank, events[0].serviceId: serviceId must not be blank]

testcase.name: ingestBatch_multipleEvents_returns202WithCorrectCount
testcase.system-out: 2026-03-31T19:53:39.187+05:30 INFO 22492 --- [log-ingestion-service] [ main] c.l.controller.LogIngestionController : Received batch of 3 log events 2026-03-31T19:53:39.190+05:30 INFO 22492 --- [log-ingestion-service] [ main] c.l.controller.LogIngestionController : Published batch of 3 log events to Kafka

testcase.name: ingestBatch_missingRequestBody_returns400
testcase.system-out: 2026-03-31T19:53:39.266+05:30 WARN 22492 --- [log-ingestion-service] [ main] c.l.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler : Malformed request body: Required request body is missing: public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<java.util.Map<java.lang.String, java.lang.Object>> com.logpipeline.controller.LogIngestionController.ingestBatch(com.logpipeline.dto.LogEventBatchRequest)

testcase.name: ingestBatch_blankServiceId_returns400WithFieldError
testcase.system-out: 2026-03-31T19:53:39.773+05:30 WARN 22492 --- [log-ingestion-service] [ main] c.l.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler : Validation failed: [events[0].serviceId: serviceId must not be blank]

testcase.name: ingestBatch_validSingleEvent_returns202WithAcceptedCount
testcase.system-out: 2026-03-31T19:53:39.846+05:30 INFO 22492 --- [log-ingestion-service] [ main] c.l.controller.LogIngestionController : Received batch of 1 log events 2026-03-31T19:53:39.850+05:30 INFO 22492 --- [log-ingestion-service] [ main] c.l.controller.LogIngestionController : Published batch of 1 log events to Kafka

testcase.name: ingestBatch_emptyEventsList_returns400
testcase.system-out: 2026-03-31T19:53:39.970+05:30 WARN 22492 --- [log-ingestion-service] [ main] c.l.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler : Validation failed: [events: events must not be empty]

testcase.name: ingestBatch_malformedJson_returns400
testcase.system-out: 2026-03-31T19:53:40.024+05:30 WARN 22492 --- [log-ingestion-service] [ main] c.l.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler : Malformed request body: JSON parse error: Unexpected character ('i' (code 105)): was expecting double-quote to start field name

testcase.name: ingestBatch_allLogLevels_areAccepted
testcase.system-out: 2026-03-31T19:53:40.081+05:30 INFO 22492 --- [log-ingestion-service] [ main] c.l.controller.LogIngestionController : Received batch of 5 log events 2026-03-31T19:53:40.086+05:30 INFO 22492 --- [log-ingestion-service] [ main] c.l.controller.LogIngestionController : Published batch of 5 log events to Kafka

testcase.name: ingestBatch_nullLevel_returns400
testcase.system-out: 2026-03-31T19:53:40.138+05:30 WARN 22492 --- [log-ingestion-service] [ main] c.l.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler : Validation failed: [events[0].level: level must not be null]

testcase.name: ingestBatch_invalidLevel_returns400
testcase.system-out: 2026-03-31T19:53:40.204+05:30 WARN 22492 --- [log-ingestion-service] [ main] c.l.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler : Validation failed: [events[0].level: level must be one of: DEBUG, INFO, WARN, ERROR, FATAL]

testcase.name: ingestSingle_invalidEvent_returns400
testcase.system-out: 2026-03-31T19:53:40.256+05:30 WARN 22492 --- [log-ingestion-service] [ main] c.l.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler : Validation failed: [serviceId: serviceId must not be blank]
